2026-04-14T08:42:00.2553666Z ---
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2554064Z description: |
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2554987Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2555885Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2556719Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2557552Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2558411Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2560287Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2560452Z on:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2560775Z   issues:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2561126Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2561497Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2561870Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2562208Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2562811Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2563518Z         required: true
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2563891Z         type: string
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2564257Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2564830Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2565043Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2565208Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2565449Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2565617Z network:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2565942Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2566284Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2566661Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2566887Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2567039Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2567418Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2567852Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2568188Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2568520Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2568866Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2569220Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2569547Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2569893Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2570233Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2570552Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2570912Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2571365Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2571705Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2572065Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2572413Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2572756Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2573095Z   noop:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2573457Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2573877Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2574207Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2575347Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2576367Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2576821Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2577314Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2577675Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2578043Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2578389Z         message:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2578920Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2579583Z           required: true
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2579975Z           type: string
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2580348Z         owners:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2581183Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2582394Z           required: true
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2582801Z           type: string
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2583171Z       steps:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2583679Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2584164Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2584807Z           env:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2585351Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2585989Z           with:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2586335Z             script: |
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2586734Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2587274Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2587680Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2587869Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2588567Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2589274Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2589757Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2590276Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2590964Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2591502Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2591911Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2592278Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2592685Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2592889Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2593103Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2593651Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2594158Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2594632Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2594814Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2596200Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2597532Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2597911Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2598121Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2598312Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2598865Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2599396Z                 try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2599827Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2600382Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2600930Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2601398Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2601842Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2602413Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2603723Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2608392Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2608880Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2609536Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2610152Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2610528Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2610988Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2611201Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2611380Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2611953Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2612507Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2612886Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2613273Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2613913Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2614767Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2615150Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2615351Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2615530Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2616144Z               try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2616676Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2617454Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2618111Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2618762Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2619130Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2619337Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2619597Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2620250Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2620809Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2621179Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2621388Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2621746Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2638761Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2639391Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2640031Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2640430Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2640637Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2640812Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2641485Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2642269Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2642864Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2643254Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2643459Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2643642Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2644121Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2644874Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2645336Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2645780Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2646265Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2646851Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2647531Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2648167Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2648622Z                   })
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2649002Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2649288Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2649464Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2650079Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2650693Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2651079Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2651282Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2651468Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2652004Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2652554Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2652861Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2653016Z                 try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2653451Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2654032Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2655885Z                     body
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2656339Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2657017Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2657786Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2658448Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2659119Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2659496Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2659853Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2660054Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2660199Z tools:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2660534Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2660873Z   github:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2661202Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2661931Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2662623Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2663416Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2663984Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2664223Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2664381Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2664950Z ---

2026-04-14T08:42:00.2696356Z           with:

2026-04-14T08:42:00.2697656Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2698046Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2698235Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2698932Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2699639Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2700101Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2700618Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2701299Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2701837Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2702251Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2702599Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2702995Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2703191Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2703402Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2704038Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2704689Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2705025Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2705200Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2706527Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);

2026-04-14T08:42:00.2708193Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2708396Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2708579Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2709138Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2709649Z                 try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2710068Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2710619Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2711158Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2711634Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2712106Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2712671Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2713890Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2714917Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2715325Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2715927Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2716533Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2716912Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2717372Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2717578Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2717742Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2718250Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2718781Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2719155Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2719526Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2720150Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2720750Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2721119Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2721327Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2721493Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2721909Z               try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2722549Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2723201Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2723972Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2724772Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2725149Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2725356Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2725617Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2726274Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2726822Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2727183Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2727380Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2727745Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2728425Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2729009Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2729602Z                 return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2729966Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2730167Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2730341Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2731013Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2731798Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2732396Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2732772Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2732985Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2733162Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2733642Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2734077Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2734666Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2735114Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2735592Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2736185Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2736850Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2737491Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2737974Z                   })
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2738356Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2738651Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2738828Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2739433Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2740030Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2740413Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2740618Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2740788Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2741333Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2741885Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2742183Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2742331Z                 try {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2742773Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2743343Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2743851Z                     body
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2744230Z                   });
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2745024Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2745805Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2746454Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2747119Z                   return;
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2747507Z                 }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2747848Z               }
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2748058Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2748201Z tools:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2748536Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2748866Z   github:
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2749198Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2749703Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2750509Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2751209Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2751870Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2752121Z 
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2752281Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2752830Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2753485Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T08:42:00.2788562Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
